descriptions: AWB is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... AWB

descriptions: The La Barberas and Grecos were on opposite sides of a conflict over a drug shipment, leading to murders and a war.
edges.evidence_quote: The La Barberas accused Di Pisa of embezzling the missing heroin. The Sicilian Mafia Commission sided with Di Pisa, and the La Barberas were outraged. The La Barberas murdered Di Pisa and Manzella, triggering a war.

descriptions: The La Barberas cooperated with other Mafia clans in a drug shipment.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1962, mafia boss Cesare Manzella organized a drug shipment to the United States with the help of two Sicilian clans, the Grecos and the La Barberas.

descriptions: The Queensmen were renamed as the Holocaust club.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amherstburg Queensmen move up to the London area to serve as a puppet club, which was renamed as the Holocaust Motorcycle Club

Clan Matrone.description: Camorra organization based in Scafati, Italy, founded in the 1970s. It was a powerful criminal group that controlled the territory and engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and violence. The clan aligned with the Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata. After the arrest of Francesco Matrone in 2012, the clan became largely disarticulated, though remnants attempted to reassert dominance.

descriptions: Cesarano clan had tensions with Matrone clan over territorial expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan went through a period of tension with the Matrone clan

descriptions: Clan Cesarano had a period of tension with the Matrone clan over control of illegal activities in Scafati.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cesarano hanno attraversato un periodo di tensione con i Matrone

descriptions: Aquino-Annunziata are historical allies of the Matrone clan.
edges.evidence_quote: storici alleati dei Matrone

descriptions: The Loreto-Matrone clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Matrone was at the head of the Loreto-Matrone clan of the Camorra

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with the Loreto family in supporting the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with the Ridosso family in supporting the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Clan Matrone opposed the NCO by aligning with the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia , cartello criminale nato con l'intento di stroncare le trame e lo strapotere della NCO di Cutolo.

descriptions: Clan Matrone sided with the Nuova Famiglia against the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Buonocore group aimed to restore the Matrone clan's dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Buonocore, alias "Zi' Peppe 'e Scafati", genero di Franco Matrone , voleva ripristinare il dominio dei Matrone su Scafati e dintorni.

descriptions: The Loreto-Matrone clan succeeded the Nuova Famiglia after its dissolution.
edges.evidence_quote: After the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia, Francesco Matrone, headed one of the most powerful clans based in the Province of Salerno.

descriptions: Kenryu-kai is likely a subgroup or affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi, as Kuwata held leadership in both.
edges.evidence_quote: Kaneyoshi Kuwata ... was the fifth generation wakagashira of the Yamaguchi-gumi ... and second generation kaicho of Kenryu-kai

descriptions: Second kumicho Yoshinori Watanabe was first kaicho of Kenryu-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: He was 1st kaicho ( 会長 ) of the Kenryu-kai ( 健竜会 )

descriptions: The Hoxton Gang fought against the Italian Mob over control of gambling clubs.
edges.evidence_quote: They were one of several West End gangs which fought against Charles "Darby" Sabini and the "Italian Mob", specifically over control of gambling clubs or "spielers".

descriptions: Caballeros is a Bandidos prospect club.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 June 2015, Road Tramps member Andrew "Odd" O'Donoghue was shot dead by Alan "Cookie" McNamara, a member of the Caballeros – a Bandidos prospect club.

descriptions: Costa cartel leader Orlández Gamboa eliminated the Valdeblanquez clan in a vendetta.
edges.evidence_quote: Orlández Gamboa eliminó al Clan Valdeblanquez en una vendetta.

descriptions: Accorinti was aided by Damiano Vallelonga in planning retaliation.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Accorinti con l'aiuto del boss di Serra San Bruno Damiano Vallelonga

descriptions: Hard Livings has associations with Westbury gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.

descriptions: The text describes the Red Army Faction as a like-minded organization to the Red Brigades.
edges.evidence_quote: Like-minded organizations were the Red Army Faction in Germany

descriptions: Mammoliti and Rugolo are allied through intermarriage and often considered a single clan.
edges.evidence_quote: closely linked to the Rugolo clan through intermarriage. They are often referred to as the Mammoliti-Rugolo clan.

descriptions: Junior Business Boys is an offshoot gang created from the Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys

descriptions: CDN and RDA were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: O CDN tinha uma aliança com outra facção amazonense, os Revolucionários do Amazonas (RDA).

descriptions: RDA is a dissident faction from CV, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: O RDA era uma dissidência criada a partir de membros que eram do CV e saíram da facção carioca.

descriptions: RDA and PCC are currently allied against CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Atualmente há informações que apontam uma aliança entre o RDA e o PCC contra o avanço do Comando Vermelho no Amazonas.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Zero Network.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: Muto and Chirillo were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 dicembre 2010 l'operazione ... hanno permesso di arrestare oltre 70 persone riconducibili ai Muto e ai Chirillo per traffico internazionale di droga

Kipps Lane Crew.description: Street gang founded in London, Ontario, Canada in 2000, operating in the Kipps Lane area. Involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, extortion, robbery, burglary, and grand theft. One of the largest street gangs in London, monitored by the London Police Service and part of the 'Big Seven' gangs in the city.

descriptions: The text explicitly states that Kipps Lane Crew is not associated with the Bloods, indicating no relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The colours of the Kipps Lane Crew are red, although the gang is not associated with the Bloods.

Salakau.description: Salakau is a secret society and gang based in Singapore, meaning 'three six nine' in Hokkien. Founded in the 1970s, it is one of the oldest and most prominent gangs in the country, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, prostitution, and white-collar crime. The gang has a history of violent turf wars and attacks on rivals, and has been subject to police crackdowns. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Omega recruited members from the Malay Muslim factions of Sio Kun Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: At its inception in 1989, Omega mainly enlisted independent Malay Muslim inmates that were not in any gang, members from pre-existing small-scale Malay groups, as well as members from the Malay Muslim factions of Chinese secret societies, such as Sio Kun Tong, also known as Salakau or 369.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked 18 Sio Yi Ho.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked Omega.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked Sakongsa.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Barreca fought against the Fontana clan in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: contro gli Imerti, i Condello, i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini, i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Condello and Fontana were involved in a favor exchange, implying cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: The Fontana clan allied with the Imerti clan during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Cappello clan was at war with the clan of Santo Mazzei.
edges.evidence_quote: Massimiliano nel gennaio 1997 rimase vittima di un agguato nella guerra contro il clan di Santo Mazzei " u carcagnusu ".

descriptions: The Green Ones fought with the Cuckoos Gang over bootlegging rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: Giannola attempted to take control of the bootlegging rackets in the area and fought with members of the Egan's Rats gang and Cuckoos Gang.

descriptions: SADAT was accused of transferring funds to Hamas.
edges.evidence_quote: the Israel Security Agency accused SADAT International Defense Consultancy (a Turkish private military company with connections to the Turkish government) of transferring funds to Hamas.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
descriptions: Zoe Mafia Family is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family

descriptions: Gallico, Morgante, Sgrò, and Sciglitano are named together as a coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

descriptions: Morgante and Sciglitano are part of the same coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

descriptions: Sgrò and Sciglitano are part of the same coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

descriptions: EPL was part of the CGSB alliance until 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Coordinadora Guerrillera Simón Bolívar ( Hasta 1994 )

descriptions: EPL was allied with Coordinadora Guerrillera Simón Bolívar until 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Coordinadora Guerrillera Simón Bolívar ( Hasta 1994 )

Azerbaijani mafia.description: General term for organized criminal gangs consisting of ethnic Azerbaijanis, primarily active in Russia and former Soviet states. Originating in the early 1980s, they rose to power in the 1990s by taking over heroin trafficking after conflicts weakened Chechen groups. Their activities include drug and arms trafficking, fraud, money laundering, and contract killing. They have expanded into Europe, with notable presence in the Netherlands, Germany, and France.

descriptions: Infobox lists Azerbaijani mafia as a rival of Armenian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Azerbaijani mafia , Turkish mafia , Pakistani mafia

descriptions: The Azerbaijani mafia is a rival of the Armenian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian mafia

descriptions: The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Chechen mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Turkish mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Chechen mafia

descriptions: The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Pakistani mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Turkish mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Chechen mafia

descriptions: The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Russian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Turkish mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Chechen mafia

descriptions: The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Turkish mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Turkish mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Chechen mafia

descriptions: Azerbaijani mafia is listed as an ally of Turkish mafia in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: British firms , Albanian mafia , Sicilian Mafia , Azerbaijani mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Colombian cartels , Bulgarian mafia , Serbian mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Cartel of the Suns

descriptions: WGM killed a former NPK member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Kwabena Nelson, also known as Kobi and a former member of NPK, was stabbed to death by members of the Wood Green Mob (WGM)

Família Terror de Amapá.description: A highly dangerous criminal organization based in Amapá, Brazil, founded in 2015 within the Amapá Penitentiary Administration Institute. It primarily engages in drug and arms trafficking, homicides, and robberies, with territorial influence extending to other Brazilian states and French Guiana. The group is allied with national factions like PCC and rivals the Comando Vermelho.

descriptions: Comando Classe A is allied with FTA.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists CCA as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , CCA

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists Comando Vermelho as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Comando Vermelho , UCA

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá has an alliance with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: sendo frequentemente alvo de operações de segurança devido à sua expansão e aliança com facções nacionais como o PCC

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists TCP as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , CCA

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists UCA as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Comando Vermelho , UCA

Romanian Constitutional Bar.description: A parallel, illegal bar association in Romania, established by Pompiliu Bota in 2002, operating without legal personality. It allowed unauthorized persons to practice law, constituting a criminal organization under Romanian law. The group was based in multiple Romanian cities and was never legally recognized.

descriptions: Both are clandestine structures led by Pompiliu Bota, but no explicit cooperation or conflict is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: The Independent Union of Romanian Jurists, led by Pompiliu Bota, is another clandestine lawyers structure.

descriptions: The Constitutional Bar was established as an alternative to the legitimate UNBR, indicating a rival or conflicting relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The Constitutional Bar ... was a parallel, illegal bar, bereft of juridical personhood, established by Pompiliu Bota in 2002 as an alternative to the 'classic bars' of Romanian lawyers, reorganized after 1990 within UNBR, which is the genuine Romanian bar association.

descriptions: UNBR Botomei's head was a former associate of Pompiliu Bota, leader of the Constitutional Bar, suggesting a cooperative past.
edges.evidence_quote: The head of UNBR Botomei, a former associate of Pompiliu Bota, was definitively sentenced to prison with immediate effect.

descriptions: UNBR-Botomei split from UNBR Bota (Constitutional Bar).
edges.evidence_quote: At one point there was UNBR-Botomei, which had split from UNBR-Bota

Clan Magliulo.description: The Clan Magliulo was a Camorra criminal organization based in Afragola, Italy, operating also in lower Lazio and Caserta. It was considered one of the most powerful Camorra families. Founded by Mario Magliulo, brother-in-law of Antonio Bardellino of the Casalesi clan, it was involved in construction contracts, control of shopping centers, drug trafficking, and a bloody feud with the Moccia clan. The clan suffered major asset seizures in 1990.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had very close contacts with the Casalesi clan, and Mario Magliulo was a co-founder with Antonio Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Magliulo avevano avuto contatti molto stretti con il clan dei Casalesi; uno dei fondatori insieme ad Antonio Bardellino, boss storico dei Casalesi, fu Mario Magliulo, cognato di Bardellino.

descriptions: Gaetano Magliulo led a splinter faction of the Falanga clan, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Gaetano Magliulo, capo della fazione camorristica di Torre del Greco e capo della frangia scissionista clan Falanga

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had direct contacts with the Esposito group.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan aveva anche contatti diretti con gli Esposito di Sessa Aurunca.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo and Clan Moccia were in a bloody feud over a construction contract in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni novanta furono protagonisti di una faida sanguinosa contro il clan Moccia: le due famiglie si contendevano l'appalto per la costruzione dell'attuale Rione Salicelle.

descriptions: Magliulo clan killed Vincenzo Moccia, leading to a war that Moccia clan won.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, Mazza's favorite son Vincenzo Moccia, called Angioletto , was killed by the rival Magliulo clan, that led to another bloody war between the clans, the Moccias came out victorious.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo was a rival in a feud with Moccia.
edges.evidence_quote: probabilmente da un gruppo di sicari al soldo dei rivali dei Moccia, ossia i clan Giugliano e Magliulo, all'epoca impegnati in una faida proprio con i Moccia

descriptions: Clan Moccia replaced Clan Magliulo.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha preso il posto del clan Magliulo

descriptions: LockBit's disruption may have boosted Akira, indicating a competitive dynamic.
edges.evidence_quote: Researchers linked its continued activity to the leaked LockBit builder and noted that disruption of the group may have boosted rival operations like Akira and RansomHub.

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate in a cocaine trafficking cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate in a cocaine trafficking cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.
